examples: In his lifetime, Marconi foresaw the development of television and the fax machine, GPS, radar, and the portable hand-held telephone.
Daniel foresaw this stuff writing way back in the year 580.
He foresaw the German trouncing of Australia on June 13.
Doan foresaw the day of cheap servers and made his software bet on that platform.
None of the banks foresaw today's mess, even though their survival was at stake.
